message:
Hot-path allocation & contention audit: O(1) pending_count, short-circuit quiescence (umelq.13.4)

- ObligationTable: cached_pending counter turns pending_count() from O(N) arena scan to O(1)
- RuntimeState::is_quiescent(): short-circuit lazy && chain avoids unnecessary scans
- RuntimeState::cancel_request(): fixed Vec capacity from O(arena_capacity) scan to fixed 32
- Delegates pending_obligation_count() to table's O(1) method

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
